description: Promotional content announcing special holiday-themed events or giveaways tied to international celebrations, targeting families with festive activities and free offers.
structural_recipe: Create announcement posts featuring: 1) Clear event headline with holiday emoji, 2) Specific offer (free item/discount) for attendees, 3) Costume/participation requirement to encourage family engagement, 4) Call-to-action with location/venue tag, 5) High visual contrast with festive imagery and emoji emphasis
why_it_works: Family-oriented Saudi audiences respond to events offering tangible value (free items) combined with entertainment for children. Festive framing and costume participation create shareable moments, while the promotional angle drives foot traffic and brand engagement during celebration periods.
transplantation_caveats: Halloween and Western secular holidays have limited cultural relevance in Saudi Arabia; localize to Islamic celebrations (Eid, Hijra) or national events instead
Costume requirements may conflict with conservative cultural dress expectations; frame as optional or offer alternative family-friendly participation methods
Verify that promotional offerings comply with local retail and advertising regulations
cultural_constraints: Avoid promotion of non-Islamic holidays without explicit localization
Ensure all imagery and messaging respect Saudi cultural and religious norms
